summary: Full backend + frontend testing of NutriSnap investor landing page. All 6 pytest backend tests passed (root greeting, POST happy path, invalid email 422, missing required 422, short message 422, GET list sorted desc). Frontend loads correctly in French, all 9 sections render, header navigation + hero CTAs scroll to correct sections, investor contact form submits successfully with success toast shown, and submission persists to MongoDB (verified via subsequent GET /api/investor-contacts). Native HTML5 validation blocks empty submit. No console errors, no broken images, dark background rgb(5,5,5) matches spec and mint green accents are visible.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores datetime as ISO string in Mongo and re-parses on read — works, but consider using native BSON datetime to leverage Mongo sort indexing on created_at.
InvestorContactCreate.organization/ticket_size default to None but frontend sends explicit null when empty — fine, but documenting empty-string vs null behavior would prevent future regressions.

CORS uses allow_origins from env with fallback '*' AND allow_credentials=True — browsers ignore credentials when origin is '*'. Not an issue for this public landing form but worth tightening if cookies are ever introduced.
ContactForm renders inline <style> tag on every mount — would be cleaner in a global stylesheet, but no functional impact.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth on this app
seed_data_creation: Created 5 TEST_-prefixed investor contacts in MongoDB via API + UI flow (test_jane@fund.vc, test_first@fund.vc, test_second@fund.vc, test_ui@fund.vc).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_investor_contacts.py is reusable as regression suite. All endpoints are public (no auth). Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env. Page is single-route '/' with French copy. data-testid registry lives at /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/nutrisnap.js (re-exported via @/constants/testIds).
